title: Syntherisma ternata
taxonomy: Syntherisma ternata belongs to the family Crambidae, specifically the subfamily Spilommatinae. It is a species of moth in the genus Syntherisma. Syntherisma ternata is a type of snout moth, classified as a microlepidopteran. The classification of this species is further defined by its order Lepidoptera and class Insecta. Syntherisma ternata is a member of the phylum Arthropoda.
